metadata.title: Smart Connections
metadata.description: Find links to similar notes using artificial intelligence from OpenAI.

regex.target: placeholder: "输入 OpenAI API 密钥"

regex.target: description: "要排除的文件夹列表,逗号分隔。"

regex.source: description: "Comma-separated list of headings to exclude."
regex.target: description: "要排除的标题列表,逗号分隔。"

regex.source: description: "Embed blocks using the embedding model."

regex.target: description: "本地,8,192 标记,512 维,中英文双语"

regex.source: description: "Minimum length of note to embed."
regex.target: description: "要嵌入的笔记的最短长度。"

regex.source: description: "Number of embeddings to process per batch on GPU. Use 0 to disable GPU."
regex.target: description: "每批次在 GPU 上处理的嵌入数量。使用 0 禁用 GPU。"

regex.source: description: "Use legacy transformers (v2) instead of v3."
regex.target: description: "使用旧版变压器(v2)而不是 v3。"

regex.source: description: "Performs a semantic search of the user's data. Required: hypothetical_1 and hypothetical_2. Optional: hypothetical_3."
regex.target: description: "对用户数据执行语义搜索。必需:hypothetical_1 和 hypothetical_2。可选:hypothetical_3。"

regex.source: description: "Short hypothetical notes predicted to be semantically similar to the notes necessary to fulfill the user's request. At least three hypotheticals per request. The hypothetical notes may contain paragraphs, lists, or checklists in markdown format. Hypothetical notes always begin with breadcrumbs containing the anticipated folder(s), file name, and relevant headings separated by ' > ' (no slashes). Format: PARENT FOLDER NAME > CHILD FOLDER NAME > FILE NAME > HEADING 1 > HEADING 2 > HEADING 3: HYPOTHETICAL NOTE CONTENTS."
regex.target: description: "预测为与满足用户请求所需的笔记语义相似的简短假设笔记。每个请求至少需要三个假设笔记。假设笔记可以包含段落、列表或检查列表,格式为 Markdown。假设笔记始终以面包屑开始,其中包含预期的文件夹、文件名和相关标题,用 ' > ' 分隔(不使用斜杠)。格式:父文件夹名称 > 子文件夹名称 > 文件名 > 标题1 > 标题2 > 标题3:假设笔记内容。"

regex.source: description: "Must be distinct from and not share any breadcrumbs with hypothetical_1."
regex.target: description: "必须与 hypothetical_1 不同,并且不能共享任何面包屑。"

regex.source: description: "Must be distinct from hypothetical_1 and hypothetical_2."
regex.target: description: "必须与 hypothetical_1 和 hypothetical_2 不同。"
"description": "启用智能更改(防止意外删除/覆盖)。"

regex.source: return `Anticipate the type of answer desired by the user. Imagine the following${params.ct ? " " + params.ct : ""} notes were written by the user and contain all the necessary information to answer the user's question. Begin responses with "${ScTranslations_default[this.env.smart_connections_plugin.settings.language].prompt}..."`

regex.source: User Agreement: By using Smart Connections you agree to share how it helps you with at least one other person \u{1F60A}\u{1F334}
regex.target: 用户协议: 使用智能连接即表示您同意与至少一个其他人分享它是如何帮助您的 \u{1F60A}\u{1F334}

regex.source: The success of Smart Connections is a direct result of our community of supporters who generously fund and evaluate new features. Their unwavering commitment to our privacy-focused, open-source software benefits all. Together, we can continue to innovate and make a positive impact on the world.
regex.target: 智能连接的成功直接得益于我们支持者社区,他们慷慨资助并评估新功能。他们对我们注重隐私的开源软件的坚定承诺造福了所有人。我们可以携手创新,积极影响世界。

regex.source: Join the next Lean Coffee session to discuss future features & improvements.
regex.target: 加入下一个Lean Coffee 会议,讨论未来的功能和改进。

regex.source: Early access to new & experimental features:
regex.target: 提前体验新功能和实验性功能:

regex.source: Early access to new versions enables supporters to help ensure new features are ready for the broader community.
regex.target: 提前体验新版本使支持者能够帮助确保新功能为更广泛的社区准备好。

regex.source: \u{1F5BC}\uFE0F Add images to Smart Chat (multimodal chat)
regex.target: \u{1F5BC}\uFE0F 将图像添加到智能聊天(多模态聊天)

regex.source: Re-ranking model in the Smart Connections View
regex.target: 在智能连接视图中重新排名模型

regex.source: Smart Chat History in canvas format
regex.target: 智能聊天历史记录(画布格式)

regex.source: PDF Support in Smart Connections view
regex.target: 智能连接视图中的 PDF 支持
在智能聊天中编辑笔记

regex.source: New retrieval methods in Smart Chat
regex.target: 智能聊天中的新检索方法

regex.source: Review retrieved context before sending in Smart Chat
regex.target: 在智能聊天中发送前审查检索到的上下文

regex.source: Audio files in Smart Connections view
regex.target: 智能连接视图中的音频文件

regex.source: ChatGPT integration with your Obsidian Vault
regex.target: ChatGPT 与你的 Obsidian 库集成
访问仅限支持者的 私人聊天

regex.source: Ask questions and share insights with other supporters.
regex.target: 向其他支持者提问并分享见解。

regex.source: Swift, top-priority support in the <a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">Supporter Chat
regex.target: 在 支持者聊天 中获得快速的优先支持

regex.source: Influence the future of Smart Connections with priority feature requests in the <a href="https://chat.smartconnections.app">Supporter Chat
regex.target: 在 支持者聊天 中通过优先功能请求影响智能连接的未来

regex.source: Learn about the latest features & improvements before they are announced.
regex.target: 在功能发布前,了解最新的功能与改进。

regex.source: For a very limited time: Early access to Smart Connect: Use ChatGPT with your notes without uploading your notes to the cloud using Smart Connect - Obsidian
regex.target: 仅限极短时间:智能连接早期访问:使用 ChatGPT 处理你的笔记 无需 将笔记上传到云端,使用 智能连接 - Obsidian

regex.source: Additional settings available in the Smart Chat settings tab (ex. chat model and api key).
regex.target: 在智能聊天设置选项卡中可以找到更多设置(例如聊天模型和 API 密钥)。

regex.source: IMPORTANT: make sure local BGE-micro-v2 embedding model works before trying other local models.
regex.target: 重要提示:在尝试其他本地模型之前,请确保本地 BGE-micro-v2 嵌入模型正常工作。

regex.source: Local model compatibility depends on available CPU and RAM. Try reducing the max tokens (context) if a local model if failing.
regex.target: 本地模型的兼容性取决于可用的 CPU 和内存。如果本地模型失败,尝试减少最大 token(上下文)数量。

regex.source: API models are not dependent on local compute, but they require an API key and send your notes to third-party servers for processing.
regex.target: API 模型不依赖于本地计算,但需要 API 密钥,并将你的笔记发送到第三方服务器进行处理。

regex.source: show_notice("Wait until current response is finished.")
show_notice("Supporter license key required for early access update")
regex.target: show_notice("需要支持者许可证密钥才能进行早期访问更新")

regex.source: Are you sure you want to clear all data and re-import? This action cannot be undone.
regex.target: 你确定要清除所有数据并重新导入吗？此操作无法撤销。

regex.source: Waiting for Obsidian Sync to finish...
regex.target: 等待 Obsidian 同步完成...

regex.source: `IMPORTANT: You must use the "${body.tools[0].function_declarations[0].name}" function tool!`
regex.target: `重要：您必须使用 "${body.tools[0].function_declarations[0].name}" 函数工具！`

regex.source: `The text contains a special token that is not allowed: ${specialMatch[0]}`
regex.target: `文本中包含不允许的特殊标记：${specialMatch[0]}`

regex.source: Hi, I'm ChatGPT with access to your notes via Smart Connections. Ask me a question about your notes and I'll try to answer it.
regex.target: 您好，我是通过智能连接访问您笔记的 ChatGPT。关于您的笔记,您可以问我任何问题,我会尽力回答。

regex.source: `Anticipate what the user is seeking. Respond in the form of a hypothetical note written by the user. The note may contain statements as paragraphs, lists, or checklists in markdown format with no headings. Please respond with one hypothetical note and abstain from any other commentary. Use the format: PARENT FOLDER NAME > CHILD FOLDER NAME > FILE NAME > HEADING 1 > HEADING 2 > HEADING 3: HYPOTHETICAL NOTE CONTENTS.`
regex.target: `尝试预测用户的需求。以用户编写的一份假设笔记的形式回复。笔记可以包含段落、列表或复选框，但不包含标题。请仅回复一份假设笔记，避免其他评论。使用格式：父文件夹名称 > 子文件夹名称 > 文件名称 > 标题1 > 标题2 > 标题3: 假设笔记内容。`
Obsidian HTTP 服务器正在运行

regex.source: `[Smart Connections] A new version is available! (v${latest_release})`
Hi there, welcome to the Smart Chat. Ask me a question about your notes and I'll try to answer it.
regex.target: 你好,欢迎使用智能聊天。请问你有什么关于笔记的问题,我会尽力为你解答。

regex.source: Try "Based on my notes" or "Summarize [[this note]]" or "Important tasks in /folder/"
regex.target: 试试"基于我的笔记",或者"总结[[此笔记]]",或者"/folder/中的重要任务"

regex.source: "Describe what you're looking for (e.g., 'PKM strategies', 'story elements', 'personal AI alignment')"
regex.target: "描述你要查找的内容(例如:'PKM 策略','故事元素','个人 AI 对齐')"

regex.source: Use semantic (embeddings) search to surface relevant notes. Results are sorted by similarity to your query. Note: returns different results than lexical (keyword) search.
regex.target: 使用语义(嵌入)搜索来展示相关笔记。结果按与查询的相似度排序。注意:与词汇(关键词)搜索返回的结果不同。

regex.source: data-description="Folder to store Smart Chat history. Use a preceeding . to hide it (ex. .smart-chats)."
regex.target: data-description="用于存储智能聊天历史的文件夹。使用前置 . 隐藏文件夹(例如:.smart-chats)."

regex.source: data-description="Folder to store system prompts. Available in chat by typing '@'"
regex.target: data-description="用于存储系统提示的文件夹。在聊天中输入 '@' 即可使用。"

regex.source: data-description="API Key required to use Cohere re-ranker."
regex.target: data-description="使用 Cohere 重新排序器所需的 API 密钥。"
